ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Simulation parameters (e.g., rotation, no-rotation, with/without spin balance) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("experiment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., rotation, no-rotation, with/without spin balance) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter (e.g., true, false, 0.02, 0.05) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter value (e.g., integer, float, boolean) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value (e.g., meters, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_settings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "experiment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type (e.g., wind tunnel test, CFD simulation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data point belongs to */,
  "x_value" REAL /* X-coordinate value of the data point */,
  "y_value" REAL /* Y-coordinate value of the data point */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the data point (e.g., x-value, y-value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "upload_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., data, readme) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., csv, txt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_files_upload_by FOREIGN KEY ("upload_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_simulation_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., rotation, no-rotation, with/without spin balance) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter (e.g., true, false, 0.02, 0.05) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter value (e.g., integer, float, boolean) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value (e.g., meters, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_simulation_settings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., No-Rotation w/o SB, No-Rotation + SB) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result (e.g., 0.02, 0.05) */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., aerodynamic force, moment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag or keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or note */,
  "commented_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_commented_by FOREIGN KEY ("commented_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
